Name: Beginner Crochet Starter Kit
Description: A complete crochet kit for beginners. Includes yarn, hook, stitch markers, and a step-by-step guide to create your first project.

Name: DIY Candle Making Gift Box
Description: Make your own scented candles at home. Includes soy wax, fragrance oils, wicks, and jars. Perfect as a present.

Name: Watercolor Painting Starter Set
Description: High quality watercolor set with brushes and paper. Great for beginners and hobby artists.

Name: Acrylic Paint Set - 24 Colors
Description: Acrylic paint pack with vibrant colors. Suitable for canvas, wood, and paper craft projects.

Name: Embroidery Hoop Kit
Description: DIY embroidery kit with hoop, needles, floss, and a floral design pattern. Ideal for gift crafting.

Name: Sewing Essentials Tool Set
Description: Compact sewing tool kit including scissors, needles, measuring tape, thread spools, and pins.

Name: Premium Yarn Bundle (5 Pack)
Description: Soft and durable yarn bundle for knitting and crochet. Great for sweaters, scarves, and amigurumi.

Name: Knitting Needles Set (Wooden)
Description: Lightweight wooden knitting needles set. Smooth finish for comfortable crafting sessions.

Name: Beads Jewelry Making Kit
Description: Complete jewelry kit with colorful beads, elastic strings, clasps, and tools. Perfect for bracelets and necklaces.

Name: Mini Jewelry Pliers Set
Description: Small precision pliers set for jewelry making and wire craft projects.

Name: Scrapbooking Paper Pack (50 Sheets)
Description: Decorative paper pack with mixed patterns. Great for scrapbooking, card making, and journaling.

Name: DIY Greeting Card Craft Kit
Description: Card making kit with stickers, templates, glitter glue, and craft paper. Perfect handmade gift experience.

Name: Hot Glue Gun + Glue Sticks Set
Description: High temperature glue gun with 20 glue sticks included. Useful for many craft projects.

Name: Craft Scissors Set (3 Pack)
Description: Multipurpose scissors set for paper cutting, fabric trimming, and detailed craft work.

Name: DIY Resin Art Starter Kit
Description: Resin art kit including epoxy resin, pigments, mixing tools, and molds. Create keychains and decorations.

Name: Polymer Clay Starter Kit
Description: Set of polymer clay blocks with sculpting tools. Perfect for charms, mini figurines, and creative gifts.

Name: DIY Soap Making Kit
Description: Homemade soap kit with soap base, molds, fragrance oils, and color pigments.

Name: Wood Painting Decoration Set
Description: Wooden shapes set for painting and decorating. Includes stars, hearts, and seasonal designs.
